AI-POWERED SECOND BRAIN

Capture every thought.
Connect every memory.
Remember everything.

Memvel uses AI to extract tasks, reminders, and ideas from your voice, photos, videos, and notes — then auto-connects them into a living knowledge graph.

FEATURES

Everything your brain does, but better

Six powerful modes, one intelligent system.

🎙
Voice Capture
Speak naturally. AI transcribes, extracts tasks and reminders, detects speakers, and links your words to past memories.
📸
Image Capture
Snap receipts, posters, whiteboards. OCR extracts text. AI schedules reminders and connects to related notes.
🎬
Video Capture
Record moments. AI auto-timestamps, transcribes, and surfaces what matters — even weeks later.
✍️
Smart Notes
Write freely. AI tags, connects, and links your notes to everything related in your memory graph — as you type.
⬡
Memory Map
Your thoughts as a living knowledge graph. See connections between people, topics, ideas, and events. Pan, zoom, filter.
💸
Expense Tracking
Mention money in any capture and Memvel passively logs income, expenses, and debts — no manual entry required.
PROCESS

From capture to intelligence in seconds

Three steps. Zero friction. A brain that grows with you.

1
🎙
Capture
Speak, snap, record, or write. Memvel accepts any input format on iOS and Android — in any language.
2
🧠
AI Processes
AI transcribes, extracts tasks & reminders, resolves relative times, and identifies financial transactions — automatically.
3
⬡
Connected Intelligence
Related memories are auto-linked. Your knowledge graph grows. Tasks land in your to-do list. Reminders fire at the right time.
CAPTURE MODES

Every format. One brain.

Voice, image, video, or text — AI understands them all.

Voice — the fastest capture
Talk like you think. Memvel handles the rest.
  • Real-time transcription in 100+ languages
  • Speaker diarisation — who said what

  • Auto-connect to related memories
  • Passive expense detection

⬡ AUTO-CONNECTIONS (3)
📱 Mobile Strategy 🚀 Product Launch 2024 👥 Beta Program
Notes — write, connected
Your notes link themselves to everything you know.
  • Rich text formatting
  • Real-time auto-tagging as you type
  • Live connection suggestions
  • Instant save, always synced
KNOWLEDGE GRAPH

See how your memories connect

Every memory is a node. AI finds the links — between people, topics, ideas, and events. The map grows with you.

  • Interactive pan & zoom
  • Filter by type: Person · Topic · Task · Idea · Event
  • Tap any node to see connected memories
  • Date range filtering
  • 36+ auto-connections from day one
AI INTELLIGENCE

The AI that actually understands you

Smart extraction, intent-awareness, and automatic connections.

Smart Extraction
Pulls meaning from everything you capture
  • ✓
    Auto-extract tasks from voice & notes
  • ✓
    Set reminders from relative time ("in 1 week")
  • ✓
    Detect speaker identity in recordings
  • ✓
    Identify expenses passively
Intent-Aware
Only acts on what you actually mean
  • ✓
    Only extracts YOUR tasks (not "John needs to...")
  • ✓
    85%+ confidence threshold before creating tasks
  • ✓
    Resolves "tomorrow at 10pm" to exact timestamp
  • ✓
    Retries failed extractions automatically
Auto-Connect
Builds your knowledge graph in the background
  • ✓
    Links related memories automatically
  • ✓
    Cross-format linking (voice ↔ image ↔ note)
  • ✓
    Semantic similarity search
  • ✓
    Growing connection strength over time
AI SUMMARY
You discussed the project deadline with Sarah on Tuesday. Key points: mobile-first approach, invite-only beta, budget of $45K. Call scheduled for Thursday morning.
All
Voice
Notes
Snaps
Videos
🎙 Voice 2d ago · 3:42 PM
"I need to call Sarah tomorrow about the project deadline and the Q2 budget allocation..."
✍️ Note 4d ago · 11:15 AM
Project brief: mobile-first, invite-only beta, $45K budget. Launch target: Q3 2026.
SEMANTIC SEARCH

Ask questions. Get answers from your own memories.

Memvel uses AI embeddings so you can search by meaning, not just keywords. Ask "what did I think about last month?" and get real answers.

  • Natural language search in any language
  • AI summary at the top of every search
  • Filter by memory type and source
  • Date range filtering
